hypothesis.strategy: Improve 3 lowest-scoring articles (code-generation, automated-experiment-design, template-free-research) with 2026 papers, new technical sections, and diagrams
hypothesis.reasoning: code-generation has sourcing=51 (biggest gap in wiki), automated-experiment-design has depth=62 and currency=61, template-free-research has depth=65 and currency=68. Adding 2026 papers with footnotes should move sourcing; new technical sections with diagrams should move depth; 2026 papers should move currency.

additions: Self-Improving Code Agents section (SICA, Robeyns et al. 2025)
AI-Supervisor persistent research world model section (2026)

results.lesson: code-generation had the largest gain (+10.2) because sourcing was extremely low (51) and adding 5 footnoted refs moved it to 86. Depth is the most responsive dimension when adding entirely new technical sections with diagrams (62→88, 65→89). Currency responds well to 2026 papers (61→76, 68→83).
